summary: Complete testing of Equipment Tab feature (P4) - Mining Equipment, Medical Supplies, Backpacks, Undersuits. All 14 backend pytest tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Gear page now shows 3 tabs with correct counts.

issues: Minor console hydration warnings (span inside select/option) - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected
